name: synthflux
description: OpenAI-compatible media generation MCP server. Connect to SynthFlux gateway (local Go server or remote router). One baseUrl + apiKey, image / TTS / video across Agnes, StepFun, or your own router gateway backend.

interface.longDescription: Connect to a SynthFlux gateway instance (local Go server or remote router). One baseUrl + apiKey, image / TTS / video via OpenAI-compatible protocol. Supports Agnes, StepFun, or your own router gateway backend.
